generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides 3D point cloud data for object detection and tracking using Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor. Integrated with Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking component for DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures RGB-D data via Intel RealSense D435i depth camera for environmental perception and RGB-D fusion with LiDAR tracks."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraRGBDDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors ego vehicle speed and steering angle via onboard sensors. Data used for vehicle state tracking and ACC control."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Transmits raw and processed LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX to Data Collection FE in Digital Twin Entity via ROS2 message formats over Wi-Fi."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraRGBDDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Transmits RGB-D data from Intel RealSense D435i for fusion with LiDAR tracks in Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking component."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Transmits ego vehicle speed and steering angle data to Data Collection FE in Digital Twin Entity for real-time state monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ObjectTrackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks (IDs, positions, velocities) generated via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering in Physical Twin Entity, forwarded to Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilteringModel
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommandTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Event-based triggers for emergency braking or ACC state changes (enable/disable) propagated from User Entity to Controlling FE in Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom UserEntityControlPanel
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements DBSCAN clustering algorithm for LiDAR point cloud segmentation in Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking component."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Applies Kalman filtering for object track state estimation in Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking component."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance RGBDFusionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Fuses RGB-D data from Intel RealSense D435i with LiDAR tracks to augment environmental perception."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance ISO15622ACCAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements ISO 15622 Performance Class I for speed control based on lead vehicle distance in ACC Controlling FE."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance PIDLikeActuationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed to motor voltage commands via PID-like control in Actuation FE."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw and processed 3D point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, used for object detection and tracking."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilteringModel
]

instance CameraRGBDData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "RGB-D data from Intel RealSense D435i for environmental perception and fusion with LiDAR tracks."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CameraRGBDDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RGBDFusionModel
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed and steering angle data for real-time state monitoring and ACC control."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO15622ACCAlgorithm
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks (IDs, positions, velocities) generated via DBSCAN and Kalman filtering."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinVisualizationService
]

instance TimeseriesVehicleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timeseries data (vehicle state, object tracks) stored in external SQL database for reporting and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted, ObjectTrackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance ROS2MessageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temporary buffering of real-time data streams in ROS2 topics for inter-entity communication."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted, CameraRGBDDataTransmitted, VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for modular communication between software components, serializing messages across entities via Data Translation FE."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationService, DigitalTwinVisualizationService, ACCControllingService, ActuationService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex tasks (e.g., point cloud processing) and offline analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudProcessingService, OfflineAnalysisService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "External SQL database for storing timeseries data (vehicle state, object tracks) for reporting and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance NVIDIAJetPack50Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA JetPack 5.0 SDK for Jetson Orin Nano programming and ROS2 node lifecycle management."
]

instance WiFiNetworkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi network for inter-entity communication with ≤100 ms latency (aligned with 3GPP TS 22.185)."
]

// C6: Services
instance DataTranslationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Serializes and translates data between entities using ROS2 message formats, ensuring interoperability."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataInteroperabilityInsight
]

instance DigitalTwinVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path via User Interface FE."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, DrivingPathVisualizationInsight
]

instance ACCControllingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements ISO 15622 Performance Class I for ACC speed control based on lead vehicle distance, offloading computation to external system."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlInsight, ComputationOffloadingInsight
]

instance ActuationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed to motor voltage commands via PID-like control in Actuation FE, interfacing with physical actuators."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotorActuationInsight, SteeringActuationInsight
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable timeseries reports from SQL database for post-analysis (e.g., system performance, anomaly detection)."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemPerformanceInsight, AnomalyDetectionInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Allows remote enable/disable ACC, speed adjustment, and emergency braking via Control Panel in User Entity."
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlInsight, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance PointCloudProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Processes LiDAR point clouds and RGB-D data using MATLAB/Simulink for complex tasks like object detection and tracking."
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectDetectionInsight, TrackFusionInsight
]

instance OfflineAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performs offline analysis of timeseries data and simulation results for system optimization."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemOptimizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance DataInteroperabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ensures seamless data translation and serialization between Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User Entities via ROS2."
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path for operators/developers."
]

instance DrivingPathVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Displays projected driving path based on object tracks and vehicle state for path planning validation."
]

instance ACCControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitors ACC performance based on ISO 15622 compliance and lead vehicle distance."
]

instance ComputationOffloadingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reduces on-board computational load by offloading ACC control to external system while maintaining real-time performance."
]

instance MotorActuationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands to motor voltage commands via PID-like control for precise speed regulation."
]

instance SteeringActuationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Controls steering angle via servo mechanism in lower-level chassis based on path planning commands."
]

instance SystemPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generates performance metrics from timeseries data for system health monitoring."
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies anomalies in vehicle state or object tracks for diagnostic purposes."
]

instance RemoteControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enables remote management of ACC state, speed adjustment, and emergency braking via Control Panel."
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers emergency braking commands from User Entity to Controlling FE in Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ObjectDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detects and tracks objects in environment using fused LiDAR and RGB-D data."
]

instance TrackFusionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fuses object tracks from multiple sensors for robust environmental perception."
]

instance SystemOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides offline analysis results for system parameter tuning and algorithm optimization."
]

// C1: Acting Components
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for precise speed control of the autonomous vehicle."
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls steering angle via servo mechanism integrated into the lower-level chassis for autonomous path following."
]

// C2: Components (Entities)
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom extension of ISO 23247 hosting Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking, Data Pre-Processing, and Actuation FEs on Jetson Orin Nano."
    base:isContainedIn AutonomousVehicleDigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hosts Data Collection, ACC Controlling, Reporting, and Presentation FEs on external server/cloud for computation offloading."
    base:isContainedIn AutonomousVehicleDigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hosts 3D Visualization and Control Panel FEs for remote management and real-time monitoring."
    base:isContainedIn AutonomousVehicleDigitalTwinEnvironment
]

// C5: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle digital twin system with centralized architecture for ACC development and testing."
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity,
                   ROS2MiddlewareEnabler, MATLABSimulinkEnabler, WiFiNetworkEnabler, NVIDIAJetPack50Enabler
]

// Add missing UserEntityControlPanel instance
instance UserEntityControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control panel component in User Entity for remote management of ACC state, speed adjustment, and emergency braking."
    base:isContainedIn UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual to physical world include:
  - **Desired speed commands**: Computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** (Digital Twin Entity) and sent back to the **Actuation FE** in the Physical Twin Entity, which converts them into motor voltage commands via the **Vedder ESC**.
  - **Remote management commands**: Enabled via the **Control Panel** (User Entity), including:
    - **Enable/Disable ACC**: Triggers state changes in the **Controlling FE**.
    - **Modify desired speed**: Directly adjusts the speed setpoint in the **ACC Controlling FE**.
    - **Emergency braking**: Overrides normal operation by sending a high-priority command to the **Actuation FE**.
  Commands are transmitted via **ROS2 topics** (within the vehicle) and **Wi-Fi** (between entities) with a **maximum end-to-end latency of 100 ms** (per 3GPP TS 22.185)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time** with the following constraints:
  - **Data collection and processing**: Sensor data (LiDAR, camera, vehicle state) is updated at the **perception cycle rate** (typically **10–30 Hz** for LiDAR and camera fusion).
  - **Control loop**: The **ACC Controlling FE** computes desired speed at a rate aligned with the **actuation cycle** (≤100 ms latency per 3GPP TS 22.185).
  - **Clock synchronization**: Devices must maintain **100 ms accuracy** for event ordering and coordination (limited by hardware constraints)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DTS follows an **ISO 23247-based reference architecture** with custom adaptations:
  - **Entities**:
    1. **Physical Twin Entity** (custom): Hosts **sensors**, **actuators**, and **pre-processing** (e.g., point cloud clustering).
    2. **Digital Twin Entity**: Hosts **data collection**, **control logic (ACC)**, and **reporting**.
    3. **User Entity**: Provides **visualization** and **remote control** interfaces.
  - **Functional Entities (FEs)**:
    - **Data Translation FE**: Handles serialization and unit conversion for all data streams.
    - **Controlling FE**: Implements ACC logic (ISO 15622 compliant).
    - **Presentation FE**: Pre-processes data for 3D visualization.
    - **Reporting FE**: Generates human-readable reports from raw data.
  - **Deployment**: Entities are distributed across hardware (e.g., **Jetson Orin Nano** for PT, cloud for Digital Twin Entity) with **ROS2** and **Wi-Fi** as communication backbones."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DTS covers the following lifecycle stages of the PT:
  - **Design/Development**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for ACC algorithm validation (e.g., ISO 15622 compliance for **Performance Class I ACC**).
  - **Operation**: Enables **real-time monitoring**, **remote management**, and **predictive maintenance** (e.g., brake system prognosis via integrated simulators like **CREO Simulate**).
  - **Lifecycle Management**: Supports **digital threads** for end-to-end information flow (e.g., data collection for post-operation analysis).
  The DT represents the PT **as operated**, with fidelity constrained by sensor accuracy (e.g., LiDAR/camera limitations) and computational offloading latency."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are addressed through:
  - **Sensor Accuracy**:
    - **LiDAR (Hokuyo UST-10LX)**: Provides high-resolution point clouds but may have **occlusion errors** in cluttered environments.
    - **Camera (Intel D435i)**: RGB-D fusion improves robustness but introduces **latency** (~30 Hz update rate).
  - **Model Validation**:
    - **ACC Algorithm**: Validated against **ISO 15622 Performance Class I** requirements.
    - **Actuation Model**: Tested for **real-time response** (≤100 ms latency).
  - **Uncertainty Handling**:
    - **Kalman Filtering**: Mitigates noise in object tracks.
    - **Clock Synchronization**: Ensures **100 ms accuracy** for distributed coordination (limited by hardware).
  - **Verification Mechanisms**:
    - **ROS2 Testing Framework**: Validates node interactions.
    - **Public Demonstration**: Provides empirical evidence of real-world performance (e.g., [YouTube demo](https://youtu.be/Rv-sJJQc3WU))."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT includes:
  - **Network Protocol**: **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity communication with **≤100 ms latency** (per 3GPP TS 22.185).
  - **Data Serialization**: **ROS2 message formats** (e.g., `sensor_msgs/PointCloud2`, `geometry_msgs/Twist`) for sensor data and commands.
  - **Clock Synchronization**: Devices synchronized to **100 ms accuracy** (hardware-constrained) for event ordering.
  - **Middleware**: **ROS2** enables modular communication between:
    - **Physical Twin Entity** (on-board sensors/actuators).
    - **Digital Twin Entity** (cloud/external server).
    - **User Entity** (remote UI)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DTS is deployed across heterogeneous hardware:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**:
    - Hosted on the **Jetson Orin Nano** (on-board compute) and **Jetson NX antenna**.
    - Runs **ROS2 nodes** for sensor fusion (LiDAR/camera) and actuation.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**:
    - Deployed on an **external server/cloud** for computation offloading (e.g., ACC logic).
    - Uses **SQL database** for persistent storage of timeseries data.
  - **User Entity**:
    - Hosted on a **remote workstation** with **3D visualization** (e.g., Unity-like interface) and **Control Panel** (web-based or desktop app).
  - **Communication**: **Wi-Fi** links entities with **≤100 ms latency**; **ROS2 topics** handle intra-vehicle communication."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DTS adheres to the following standards:
  - **Architectural Standard**: **ISO 23247 Part 2** (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework Reference Architecture), adapted for automotive use.
  - **ACC Standard**: **ISO 15622** (Performance Class I requirements for ACC).
  - **Communication Standards**:
    - **3GPP TS 22.185** (≤100 ms latency requirement for V2V communication).
    - **ROS2** (de facto standard for robotics middleware).
  - **Safety-Critical Considerations**:
    - **Clock synchronization** aligned with automotive-grade timing requirements (100 ms accuracy).
    - **Data integrity** ensured via **ROS2 message validation** and **SQL database transactions**."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety and security are addressed through:
    - **Real-time constraints**: **100 ms latency** and **clock synchronization** ensure timely and coordinated actions (e.g., emergency braking).
    - **ACC compliance**: Adherence to **ISO 15622** for safe operation of the ACC system.
    - **Remote management**: **Emergency braking commands** can be issued remotely, though the document does not specify **cybersecurity measures** (e.g., encryption, authentication) for Wi-Fi or ROS2 communication.
    The system assumes **hardware limitations** (e.g., 100 ms clock accuracy) and does not detail **fallback mechanisms** for network failures or sensor errors."
]
